meta_title: For Freelancers: SaaS starter kit to Solve can't scale projects (Advanced Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to SaaS starter kit and overcome can't scale projects. A Advanced-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: SaaS Starter Kit: Scale Your Freelance Projects Rapidly
content.seo_description: Stop manual coding. Use our SaaS starter kit checklist with Antigravity and Claude Code to scale your freelance output and deliver professional apps faster.
content.answer_block: To scale your freelance business, abandon manual boilerplate setup. Implement a robust SaaS starter kit featuring modular authentication, billing, and database schemas. By leveraging AI agents like Antigravity and Claude Code, you automate repetitive scaffolding, allowing you to focus purely on high-margin business logic and feature delivery for your clients.
content.intro:
The freelance trap is real: you spend 60% of your billable hours on database schemas, Stripe integration, and authentication boilerplate. Every new client feels like starting from scratch, dragging your profit margins into the ground while your competitors ship feature-rich products in half the time.

It is time to stop being a manual laborer and start being an architect. By adopting a hardened SaaS starter kit, you transform your workflow from 'bespoke crafting' to 'industrial assembly.' With the precision of Antigravity and the autonomous execution of Claude Code, you can turn a week of setup into a two-hour deployment, reclaimed for your life and your bottom line.

steps.title: Standardize Your Tech Stack
steps.description: Define a rigid foundation (e.g., Next.js, Supabase, Tailwind) to ensure every project starts with a consistent, battle-tested architecture.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a directory structure for a production-ready SaaS starter kit including folders for auth, db, stripe-hooks, and ui components.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --prompt 'Initialize project structure based on Next.js/Supabase template'

steps.title: Automate Authentication & RBAC
steps.description: Don't write auth code manually. Use your starter kit to inject pre-configured NextAuth or Supabase Auth flows instantly.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a secure middleware configuration for route protection and role-based access control.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --prompt 'Add auth middleware and user profile schema to the database'

steps.title: Inject Stripe Billing Logic
steps.description: Integrate subscription tiers and webhooks using a standardized pattern that works across all your client projects.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a Stripe webhook handler that updates user subscription status in the database.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --prompt 'Configure Stripe checkout session and webhook endpoint'

steps.title: Component Library Scaffolding
steps.description: Use Antigravity to generate reusable UI patterns from your starter kit design system to maintain visual consistency.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a responsive dashboard layout with sidebar navigation and data table components using Shadcn UI.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --prompt 'Generate dashboard UI components based on the design system'

steps.title: CI/CD Pipeline Automation
steps.description: Automate deployment workflows so every push triggers tests and pushes to staging/production automatically.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a GitHub Actions workflow for automated testing and Vercel deployment.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --prompt 'Setup GitHub Actions for continuous integration and deployment'

pro_tips: Always maintain your starter kit in a private GitHub repository; pull it as a template to prevent 'git merge' hell.
Use Claude Code to write unit tests for your auth hooks before pushing; it catches 90% of edge-case bugs.
Treat your database schema as code; use migration files exclusively so your AI tools can understand the current state.
Keep your UI components in a local library folder rather than relying on external npm packages to ensure long-term stability.
Automate your documentation generation using Claude Code to keep client hand-offs frictionless and professional.
content.next_steps: After completing your first project with this starter kit, audit your performance metrics and identify the next manual task you can automate using custom Antigravity scripts.
content.conversion_block: Stop wasting billable hours on boilerplate and start scaling your freelance agency like an elite engineering firm. The tools are ready, the framework is set, and the market is waiting for your next big build. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
